changes: Replaced bash grep/sed RSS parsing with explicit Python xml.etree.ElementTree code
Added clear instruction to read local XML files instead of downloading from URLs
Added complete Python code example for parsing RSS with proper date conversion (RFC 2822 to YYYY-MM-DD)
Specified all 4 feed categories (tech, business, world, science) explicitly for multi-feed tasks
Added JSON schema for multi-feed digest output with highlights spanning multiple categories
Added detailed key_numbers extraction guidance for article summarization
